item.title: Adobe IO and Cloud Manager API
item.description: Cloud Manager, part of the Adobe Managed Services, is a continuous integration and continuous delivery (CI/CD) framework that lets organisations deploy code to their AEM environments. This is only applicable for organisations which use Adobe Managed Services to host their AEM installations with Adobe. The pipeline runs through a standard set of steps as shown below. Output of each step is available via an API through Adobe I/O, which is like a central place to manage all Adobe APIs.
